combines_response_and_start_functionalit: Combines response and start functionality. Sends structured responses and allows workflow to resume from this point.
configure_notification_tools_to_alert_ap: Configure notification tools to alert approvers (e.g., Slack, Email)
define_the_fields_the_approver_can_fill_: Define the fields the approver can fill in when resuming
display_data_shown_to_the_approver: Display data shown to the approver
form_submission_data_from_the_approver: Form submission data from the approver
iso_timestamp_when_the_workflow_was_resu: ISO timestamp when the workflow was resumed
pause_workflow_execution_and_wait_for_hu: Pause workflow execution and wait for human input
raw_input_data_submitted_when_resuming: Raw input data submitted when resuming
resume_api_endpoint_url_for_direct_curl_: Resume API endpoint URL for direct curl requests
